Name: postgis_locations
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."postgis_locations" ORDER BY "name" ASC) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name", ST_AsGeoJSON("_root.base"."geom", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "geom", ST_AsGeoJSON("_root.base"."geog", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "geog", ST_AsGeoJSON("_root.base"."area", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "area", ST_AsGeoJSON("_root.base"."nullable_geom", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "nullable_geom") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
